title: Performance & Scaling
description: N+1 queries, caching, lazy loading, profiling
longDescription: A slow app loses users. Performance isn't about premature optimization — it's about knowing the common traps that make apps crawl and the straightforward fixes for each. Similar to a highway, your app can handle plenty of traffic until one bottleneck causes everything to gridlock. This course covers the biggest performance killers: N+1 queries, missing caches, bloated bundles, unoptimized images, and rendering bottlenecks. You'll learn to spot them, fix them, and measure the difference.
